line_1: O'er champaigns where the Tartar speeds,
line_2: O'er many a forest dark as night,

line_1: And o'er the silent scene Time, like a giant, speeds!
line_2: So sad decay and mortal change succeeds,

line_1: "Far with the Loves each blissful omen speeds,
line_2: "The bridal bed the sable hearse succeeds,
